topStories.description: Two Iraqi security officials – who spoke on the condition of anonymity said the journalist, Shelly Kittleson was abducted from central Baghdad’s Saadoun Street. Here's all you need to know about her and the kidnapping

topStories.title: Ukraine to ask US mediators to pass on Easter ceasefire offer to Russia
topStories.description: Ukraine's president hosts EU leaders to mark Bucha massacre anniversary, says negotiator Umerov in Turkiye for talks.

topStories.title: US Stocks today: Dow Jones soars 1,125 points, Nasdaq, S&P 3% as Iran war de-escalation seen
topStories.description: Wall Street surged Tuesday as speculation of a de-escalation in the Middle East conflict eased oil price and inflation fears. Major indexes rallied following reports of President Trump's willingness to end military action against Iran. Investors are seeking indications of a normalized energy flow through the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.description: US diplomats should use social media platform X and partner with military psychological operations units in an effort to "counter foreign anti-American propaganda," Secretary of State Marco Rubio...

dailyNews.title: SC panel deprecates Rajasthan govt for ‘unabated’ contamination of Jojari-Luni-Bandi river system
dailyNews.description: A Supreme Court committee criticized Rajasthan's government for failing to address severe industrial pollution damaging the Jojari-Luni-Bandi river system.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court rejects Colorado ban on LGBTQ child ‘conversion therapy’
dailyNews.description: In an eight-to-one decision, the high court ruled against a law banning the discredited practice on free speech grounds.

dailyNews.title: ‘I need to leave’: Cuba’s tourism workers reel from US oil blockade
dailyNews.description: From taxi drivers to tour guides, the collapse of Cuba’s tourism industry has left thousands struggling to get by.

dailyNews.description: The US state department says a suspect in her abduction has ties to an Iran-backed militia group, Kataib Hezbollah.

dailyNews.description: Meta faces thousands more court cases while Congress has proposed numerous bills addressing children’s online safety, some heavily criticized.

dailyNews.title: Warren Buffett To Stop Donations To Gates Foundation Over Epstein Files
dailyNews.description: Buffett said he has not spoken with Gates since the US Department of Justice released documents in February, showing that Gates and Epstein met repeatedly.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s FM confirms contact with US envoy Witkoff, denies talks under way
dailyNews.description: Iran's top diplomat Araghchi has told Al Jazeera that, despite contacts, Iran is not in negotiations with the US.

dailyNews.title: Iran Minister Says In Direct Contact With US Envoy, But "No Negotiations"
dailyNews.description: Speaking to Al Jazeera, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said, "I receive messages from Witkoff directly, as before, and this does not mean that we are in negotiations."

dailyNews.title: Judge Blocks Trump’s Order to End Funding for NPR and PBS
dailyNews.description: The ruling will have minimal effect on the federal money going to public media because Congress voted to claw back funding. But it could have implications for any future funding.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Presidential Library Video Draws Mixed Reactions From Miami Residents
dailyNews.description: The president’s foundation released a video showing a gleaming tower by Biscayne Bay emblazoned with his name. It would dominate the skyline.

dailyNews.title: Trump Redefines ‘Regime Change’ in Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump and his aides have made contradictory statements on whether the United States and Israel have transformed the Iranian government through violence.

dailyNews.title: Will $4 Gas Hurt Trump’s Approval Ratings? Here’s What History Shows.
dailyNews.description: Presidents since at least the Carter administration have seen their approval ratings tied to gas prices. But there are signs the correlation may be weakening.

dailyNews.title: Backdoor Funding of Homeland Security Agency Could Weaken Congress Anew
dailyNews.description: An emerging Republican plan to skirt a Democratic filibuster and fund an entire department without congressional appropriations would be the latest example of surrendering power to the White House.

dailyNews.title: Judge temporarily blocks construction of Trump's White House ballroom
dailyNews.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked the Trump administration's construction of a 90,000-square-foot ballroom to replace the White House's East Wing,

dailyNews.title: Ripple effects of rising oil prices on the U.S. economy
dailyNews.description: The U.S. is pressing forward with its strikes against Iran as the White House pushes for Tehran to make a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Kelly O'Grady, Eleanor Watson and Nancy Cordes report.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order aiming to restrict mail-in voting
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long wanted to place additional restrictions on mail-in voting, which he has called "mail-in cheating."

dailyNews.title: Examining possible scenarios if Trump ends war in Iran and Strait of Hormuz stays closed
dailyNews.description: The Wall Street Journal reports President Trump has considered ending the war in Iran without reopening the Strait of Hormuz. On Tuesday, he told the New York Post it would reopen automatically. CBS News national security analyst Aaron MacLean joins "The Takeout" to examine the situation.

dailyNews.title: John Bolton says Trump "wants out" of Iran war, but "doesn't know what to do"
dailyNews.description: President Trump told CBS News on Tuesday that "we've had total regime change" in Iran. Former Trump national security adviser John Bolton joins "The Takeout" with his reaction.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war could wrap up in 2-3 weeks as gas prices rise
dailyNews.description: President Trump indicated Tuesday the Iran war may wrap up "very soon" and he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the war pushes U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. not leaving Strait of Hormuz "quite yet" as he criticizes NATO allies
dailyNews.description: President Trump told CBS News on Tuesday that he's not ready "quite yet" to abandon his bid to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News senior White House correspondent Weijia Jiang has the details.
